column1: Models are beginning to agree on a general direction this system may take if and when it develops over the next 5-7 days.

It's so wild how 24 hours ago we were seeing it going up the east coast and now it's going into the gulf.
Hurricane Season is always just so full of the unknown.
Mother Nature is unpredictable
stop with Mother Nature
people seem to forget that we still can’t actually predict the future

that's why I would prefer to see an honest forecast many days in advance. It's still the weather (weather or not) and even with the technology we should understand IT will still do what it wants based on the path it takes and the energy it picks up along the way.

your use of “should” simply means the technology doesn’t meet your expectations, which likely indicates a limited understanding of the limits of said technology.
There’s a lot of constantly shifting wind patterns, and historical data (one of the many variables in the equations) probably isn’t as helpful due to the recent change in climate overall.
sorry you didn't understand what I was trying to say. Nothing negative or self serving in my comments. Will just continue to watch how this latest storm plays out.
